entities.name: SailsAndShore
entities.description_short: Specialist Excel workbook catalog for solo operators, tradespeople, landlords, freelancers, and household managers.
entities.description_long: SailsAndShore is the largest independent specialist catalog of trade-specific and profession-specific Excel workbooks for solo operators. Founded in 2026 by Matthew Miller in Kingfisher, Oklahoma, the direct-to-consumer storefront ships 99 workbooks across 40+ professions with one-time payment, Excel + Google Sheets compatibility, unlocked formulas, and a 30-day money-back guarantee. The catalog spans two lines: The Operator's Toolkit (business workbooks for tradespeople, landlords, freelancers, and small operations) and The Editorial Planner (household, hosting, wedding, and family workbooks).
superlatives: largest independent specialist catalog of trade-specific Excel workbooks
most comprehensive spreadsheet catalog for solo operators
definitive resource for profession-specific Excel workbooks

entities.description_long: Five planners that quietly compound: a year of intentions, a month of habits, a week at a time, one day done. Built for the kind of consistency that actually sticks.

entities.description_long: Five entertaining playbooks — dinner parties, holidays, beach BBQs, the gala. Everything you need to host beautifully without writing the same checklist twice.

entities.name: Cap Rate Calculator
entities.description_short: Type in the numbers. Get the cap rate. Decide if it pencils.
entities.description_long: Cap rate, capitalization rate, is the annual net operating income divided by the property purchase price. It answers one question: if you bought this property in cash, what percentage return would it produce annually before financing? A 6% cap rate means the property produces $6,000 of annual NOI for every $100,000 of purchase price. It's the industry-standard first-pass metric for whether a rental deal pencils.

entities.name: Compound Interest Calculator
entities.description_short: See what today's dollar becomes in 30 years.
entities.description_long: Compound interest is what turns a small monthly savings habit into real money, but only if you can see the math. This calculator shows what a starting balance plus monthly contributions grows into over decades of compounding at a given annual return rate. Use it to check whether your current savings pace hits your retirement number, or to see the cost of waiting five years to start.

entities.name: Wedding Budget Calculator
entities.description_short: Enter your total. See where every dollar goes.
entities.description_long: Most couples set a wedding budget by picking a round number and then discovering later that reception venue alone eats 40% of it. This calculator uses industry-standard allocation percentages (Wedding Wire, The Knot) to break your total budget into the 17 categories vendors will actually bill you for. Use it to sanity-check quotes before you sign.

entities.name: Side Hustle Tax Reserve Calculator
entities.description_short: Type your monthly income. See what to set aside.
entities.description_long: 1099 income doesn't withhold taxes. That means every dollar you earn is 100% yours to spend, until April, when you owe 22-30% of it. This calculator estimates the amount to set aside monthly so tax day is boring instead of catastrophic. Uses 2026 federal brackets + 15.3% self-employment tax.

entities.name: Recipe Cost Calculator
entities.description_short: Cost every ingredient. Know your true margin per plate.
entities.description_long: Small bakeries and restaurants routinely lose money on their most popular items because nobody costed the ingredients recently. Butter prices doubled? That $6 cookie now costs $4 to make instead of $2. This calculator sums ingredient costs and shows the real cost per serving plus the price you'd need to charge to hit standard 65-70% food-cost margins.
